summary: ANDROID| Falcon | Custom EQ - Save button do not work for Falcon Custom
scenario: Custom EQ slider settings for a Falcon device are not saved after clicking Save EQ and confirming the dialog, reverting to defaults upon reopening.
description_clean: When a user sets Custom EQ sliders for a Falcon device and clicks the Save EQ button (confirming the dialog), the slider settings are not saved and revert to defaults upon reopening the Custom EQ settings. Additionally, there is a minor issue with the dialog description text that needs fixing.
steps: Navigate to the Custom EQ section.
Adjust the EQ sliders to custom values.
Confirm the save dialog when prompted.
expected: The custom EQ slider settings should be saved and persist when reopening the Custom EQ settings.
actual: The slider settings are not saved and revert to defaults upon reopening the Custom EQ settings.
